description_long: This coffee machine features a vintage, steampunk-inspired design with a wooden body and brass metallic accents. The front showcases two prominent brass levers, spouts, and circular dials, suggesting a manual espresso operation. Several takeaway coffee cups with lids are placed on the top and lower shelves, indicating its use in a commercial or urban setting. The side panels are curved and made of wood, with metallic trim and a visible winding key on one side, adding to its antique aesthetic. The control panel is equipped with levers and knobs, all crafted from brass, and the machine sits on a flat wooden base. The overall construction appears robust and decorative, suitable for a stylish café or urban coffee stand.
description: A vintage-style coffee machine with a wooden body, brass levers, and multiple takeaway cups, featuring ornate metallic details and a manual control panel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the curved wooden panel, brass levers, and several takeaway cups on the top shelf.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the dual brass levers, spouts, dials, and the arrangement of cups on both shelves.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear look at the wooden panel, metallic trim, and more takeaway cups on the top shelf.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the full wooden back panel with metallic trim and no visible controls or cups.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two brass levers and two dials symmetrically arranged on the front, with additional knobs and a winding key on the side; no visible labeling or icons.
